---
title: "Analysis report"
---

# Results

First   paragraph with   extra spaces.

```{r}
#| label: fit
fit<-lm(y~x,data=df)
```

Some middle text that is fine.

Another paragraph    needing a fix much further down in the document, after enough clean content that the formatter reports a second separate diff region.

```{python}
#| label: tidy
import   pandas as pd
```
